responsibilities: Develop and maintain quality control plans, inspection criteria, and PPAP documentation for new and existing products
Lead root cause analysis and 8D investigations for internal and customer quality complaints to drive corrective action
Conduct supplier quality audits and evaluations to ensure incoming materials meet specification and compliance requirements
Analyze production quality data using SPC charts to detect trends and proactively address process variation
Facilitate FMEA and control plan reviews with cross-functional teams during new product introduction
Manage CAPA processes from issue identification through verification of effectiveness and closure
Perform internal quality audits to ensure compliance with ISO 9001, AS9100, or industry-specific standards
Collaborate with manufacturing and engineering teams to resolve nonconformances and reduce scrap and rework rates
